sentences.target: Wir besetzen die Stelle ab Montag.

translations.de: Wir besetzen die Stelle ab Montag.
translations.en: We’re filling the position from Monday.
translations.es: A partir del lunes cubrimos la vacante.
translations.fr: Dès lundi, on pourvoit le poste.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们从周一开始填补这个职位。
translations.yue: 我哋由星期一開始填補呢個職位。
translations.pt: A partir de segunda, vamos preencher a vaga.
translations.he: אנחנו ממלאים את המשרה החל מיום שני.
translations.vi: Từ thứ Hai, chúng tôi bắt đầu tuyển cho vị trí này.
translations.ar: سنشغل الوظيفة ابتداءً من يوم الاثنين.
translations.nl: Vanaf maandag vullen we de vacature in.
translations.hi: हम सोमवार से यह पद भरेंगे.
translations.el: Από τη Δευτέρα καλύπτουμε τη θέση.
translations.id: Mulai Senin, kami akan mengisi posisi tersebut.
translations.sv: Från och med måndag tillsätter vi tjänsten.
translations.ja: 月曜から欠員を埋めます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative; 1st person plural subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present indicative), agreeing with ‘Wir’; means to occupy/fill something.
Definite article marking the direct object; accusative feminine singular.
Common noun; direct object of ‘besetzen’; accusative singular (feminine).
Preposition meaning ‘starting from’; introduces a temporal PP.
Proper noun (day of the week); object of the preposition ‘ab’ functioning as temporal complement.

sentences.target: Die Schüler besetzen die letzten Reihen.

translations.de: Die Schüler besetzen die letzten Reihen.
translations.en: The students occupy the back rows.
translations.es: Los alumnos se sientan en las filas de atrás.
translations.it: Gli studenti si siedono nelle ultime file.
translations.pt: Os alunos sentam-se nas últimas fileiras.
translations.vi: Học sinh ngồi ở hàng ghế phía sau.
translations.nl: De leerlingen zitten op de achterste rijen.
translations.hu: A diákok a hátsó sorokban ülnek.
translations.hi: छात्र पीछे की पंक्तियों में बैठते हैं.
translations.el: Οι μαθητές κάθονται στις πίσω σειρές.
translations.nb: Elevene sitter på de bakerste radene.
translations.id: Para siswa duduk di barisan belakang.
translations.da: Eleverne sidder på de bagerste rækker.
translations.ja: 生徒たちは後ろの列に座っている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article for the subject NP; nominative plural.
Common noun; nominative plural subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present indicative); takes an accusative object.
Definite article marking the direct object; accusative plural.
Attributive adjective modifying ‘Reihen’; agrees in case/number; accusative plural.
Common noun; direct object of ‘besetzen’; accusative plural (feminine).

sentences.target: Ich will die vorderen Sitze besetzen.

translations.de: Ich will die vorderen Sitze besetzen.
translations.en: I want to take the front seats.
translations.es: Quiero sentarme en las primeras filas.
translations.ru: Я хочу сесть на передние места.
translations.pt: Quero sentar nos lugares da frente.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn ngồi hàng ghế phía trước.
translations.uk: Я хочу сісти на передні місця.
translations.hi: मैं आगे वाली सीटों पर बैठना चाहता हूँ.
translations.id: Saya ingin duduk di kursi depan.
translations.ja: 前の席に座りたいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative; 1st person singular subject.
Modal auxiliary (present indicative, 1sg); selects an infinitive complement.
Definite article marking the NP as accusative plural.
Attributive adjective modifying ‘Sitze’; agrees in case/number; accusative plural.
Common noun; semantic object of the lexical verb ‘besetzen’; accusative plural.
Infinitive lexical verb; complement of the modal ‘will’.

sentences.target: Ihr könnt den Platz am Fenster besetzen.
sentences.reading: /iːɐ̯ kœnt deːn plat͡s am ˈfɛnstɐ bəˈzɛt͡sən/

translations.de: Ihr könnt den Platz am Fenster besetzen.
translations.ipa: /iːɐ̯ kœnt deːn plat͡s am ˈfɛnstɐ bəˈzɛt͡sən/
translations.en: You can take the seat by the window.
translations.es: Pueden sentarse en el asiento junto a la ventana.
translations.fr: Vous pouvez prendre la place près de la fenêtre.
translations.it: Potete prendere il posto vicino alla finestra.
translations.zh-Hans: 你们可以坐靠窗的座位。
translations.yue: 你哋可以坐窗邊嗰個位。
translations.pt: Vocês podem sentar no lugar junto à janela.
translations.he: אתם יכולים לשבת במקום ליד החלון.
translations.vi: Các bạn có thể ngồi chỗ cạnh cửa sổ.
translations.ar: يمكنكم الجلوس على المقعد بجانب النافذة.
translations.nl: Jullie kunnen bij het raam gaan zitten.
translations.hi: आप लोग खिड़की वाली सीट पर बैठ सकते हैं.
translations.el: Μπορείτε να καθίσετε στη θέση δίπλα στο παράθυρο.
translations.nb: Dere kan ta plassen ved vinduet.
translations.id: Kalian bisa duduk di kursi dekat jendela.
translations.ro: Puteți lua locul de la fereastră.
translations.cs: Můžete si sednout ha místo u okna.
translations.da: I kan tage pladsen ved vinduet.
translations.ja: 窓際の席に座っていいですよ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative; 2nd person plural subject.
Modal auxiliary (present indicative, 2pl); takes an infinitive complement.
Definite article marking the direct object; accusative masculine singular.
Common noun; direct object of ‘besetzen’; accusative singular (masculine).
Preposition contracted from ‘an dem’ (‘at the’); introduces a dative PP.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘am’; dative singular (neuter).
Infinitive lexical verb; complement of the modal ‘könnt’.
